title: Totem & Shield Swapper (Offhand Toggle)
description: „A smart client-side utility to instantly toggle between your Totem of Undying and your best Shield with one keypress, featuring durability checks and anti-rollback logic.“
body:
# 🛡️ **Totem & Shield Swapper (Offhand Toggle)**
A lightweight, client-side Fabric mod that allows you to instantly swap between your Totem of Undying and your best Shield in your offhand with a single keypress.

## ✨ **Features**
**Smart Toggle:** If you hold a Totem, it swaps to a Shield. If you hold a Shield (or anything else), it swaps to a Totem.

**Durability Check:** When swapping to a shield, the mod automatically selects the one with the highest durability from your inventory.

**Server-Optimized:** Uses a specialized "Triple-Click" and Packet-Logic to prevent "Ghost Items" and rollbacks on most servers.

**Custom Keybind:** Default key is G, but you can easily change it in your Minecraft controls.

## 🚀 **How to use**
Keep your Totems and Shields anywhere in your inventory or hotbar.

Press G to instantly switch your defensive utility.

Survive!

## 🛠️ **Technical Details**
**Side:** Client-side only (Works on servers without needing the mod installed there).

**Requirements: **Fabric API.

**Compatibility:** Designed for 1.20.x and newer.
